subject: PennyAlpha Morning — 2026-04-30
text:
Morning Scan — 2026-04-30

Slots: 0/5 used

ENTRIES TODAY:
No entries today — no candidates cleared the threshold.

ACTIVE POSITIONS:
None.

SCAN NOTES:
5 tickers screened, 0 passed.

BZAI ($1.75, +41%, 30M vol) — highest mover. Conviction ~6-7 but SMA20 unconfirmed after 3-day decline from $2.25; dilution 25-45% projected; no new Apr 30 8-K. Discarded per unconfirmed rule.

FATN ($2.38, +38%, 4.55M vol) — clean dilution profile, director insider buy, positive EBITDA. Apr 28-29 catalysts (VeloCloud Replacement + NASA SEWP) are press releases only, not confirmed 8-Ks. Apr 29 dollar vol $351K below $500K floor. Watch for confirmed 8-K filing.

TURB ($1.96, +32%, 9.35M vol) — AI energy/defense angle, Apr 28 6-K military deployment. Conviction only 2-3; $100M F-3 shelf vs $21.6M market cap is massive dilution overhang.

HWH, ASTC — no confirmed catalyst / negligible volume.

Macro: Meta Q1 2026 beat after close yesterday; broad market positive. No penny-range derivative catalyst confirmed.
